tool_args.label: NYCT Railcar Procurement
tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit is requesting Board approval to award a non-competitive purchase contract to Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc. for the procurement of 378 additional 'B' division revenue subway cars (the R268 'B' Division Subway Cars).

payload.title: NYCT Railcar Procurement
payload.description: Schedule A: Noncompetitive Purchases and Public Work Contracts – Board approval request for contract R34268 for 378 R268 B Division Subway Cars from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
